items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review identified a lack of clear consensus on return-to-play criteria after hamstring injury, which contributes to high recurrence rates. It analyzed existing literature to understand methodological quality for guiding future practice.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述强调了火腿肌（hamstring）损伤后重返赛场评估标准的缺失，并分析了现有研究的质量。在制定重返运动方案时，你应认识到当前指南的局限性，并根据个体情况谨慎评估。
items.titleZh: 火腿肌损伤后重返赛场加权标准的建立：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述发现，火腿肌损伤后重返赛场（RTP）缺乏明确共识，这可能导致高复发率（首月内达 57%）。该综述旨在通过分析现有研究的方法学质量来建立加权标准。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights the lack of clear return-to-play criteria after hamstring injury and analyzes the quality of existing studies. When developing return-to-sport protocols, you should recognize the limitations of current guidelines and assess each case cautiously based on individual factors.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的加权标准或推荐的重返赛场流程，主要聚焦于方法学质量分析。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific weighted criteria or recommended return-to-play protocols, focusing primarily on methodological quality analysis.

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes a new incident-level severity framework for surveillance in cycling, aiming to provide more comprehensive insights into race-related events beyond traditional injury incidence and diagnosis.
items.curatedReason: 本文提出了一套新的自行车赛事事故严重性评分框架。当你进行运动损伤监测时，可以考虑引入这类多维度指标，以更全面地评估和预防集体项目中的意外事件，而不仅仅关注个人层面的伤病诊断。
items.titleZh: 自行车赛事中与竞赛相关的事故综合严重性评分
items.summaryZh: 本文提出一个事故层面的严重性框架，用于自行车赛事监控，旨在更全面地评估竞赛中涉及多名骑手的碰撞、个人撞击或其他影响参与者安全的事件，突破传统伤病监测仅关注伤病发生率和诊断的局限。
items.curatedReasonEn: This paper proposes a new severity scoring framework for cycling race incidents. When conducting sports injury surveillance, consider incorporating such multidimensional indicators to more comprehensively assess and prevent incidents in mass-start sports, beyond just individual-level injury diagnoses.
items.limitation: 这是一个概念性框架，而非经过大规模验证的工具；其效用需在实际应用中进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a conceptual framework, not a widely validated tool; its utility requires further empirical validation in real-world applications.

items.title: Ready to respond? Safeguarding structures in European National Olympic Committees
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of 20 European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) assessed safeguarding structures, revealing that while most NOCs appointed safeguarding officers, systemic gaps exist in policies, reporting mechanisms, and case management, impacting their readiness to respond to interpersonal violence.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对欧洲国家奥委会的调查显示，尽管大多数机构设立了保障官员，但在政策、报告机制和应对能力方面仍存在系统性不足。这提醒你，即使在规范化的体育组织中，保障运动员权益的结构性支持也可能存在薄弱环节，需要持续关注和改进。
items.titleZh: 准备好应对了吗？欧洲国家奥委会的保障结构
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 个欧洲国家奥委会的横断面调查评估了其保障结构和应对人际暴力的组织准备情况。结果显示，19 个奥委会设有保障官员，但普遍存在政策、报告机制和案件管理方面的系统性不足，影响了其应对能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of European National Olympic Committees reveals systemic gaps in policies, reporting mechanisms, and response capacity, despite most organizations having safeguarding officers. This indicates that even in regulated sports organizations, structural support for athlete protection may have weaknesses, requiring continuous attention and improvement.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面调查，仅反映了特定时间点的现状，无法评估保障结构的动态变化或干预效果。
items.limitationEn: The study is a cross-sectional survey, reflecting status at a specific time point and unable to assess dynamic changes or intervention effects of safeguarding structures.

items.title: Impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: This PhD work explored the responses of the neuromuscular and musculotendinous system in vivo under different heat stress conditions, focusing on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit to determine the effects of passive heat exposure, acute heat exposure during activity, and active heat acclimation on its properties and mechanics.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究揭示了热暴露对神经肌肉和肌肉-肌腱单位特性和力学的影响。如果你在高温环境下为运动员提供康复或训练指导，应将这些发现纳入考量，以优化方案并预防热应激相关损伤。
items.titleZh: 热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 这项博士研究探讨了不同热应激条件下神经肌肉和肌肉-肌腱系统（主要针对腓肠肌内侧头）的体内反应，分析了被动热暴露、活动中急性热暴露以及主动热适应对其特性和力学的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research reveals the impact of heat exposure on neuromuscular and musculotendinous unit properties and mechanics. If you provide rehabilitation or training guidance for athletes in hot environments, you should consider these findings to optimize programs and prevent heat stress-related injuries.
items.limitation: 研究聚焦于特定肌肉群（腓肠肌内侧头），结果外推至其他肌肉群或复杂运动模式时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on a specific muscle group (medial gastrocnemius), and results should be applied cautiously when extrapolated to other muscle groups or complex movement patterns.

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the risks and opportunities of social media use for young athletes, highlighting its potential to both support and thwart basic psychological needs essential for optimal development and well-being.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论讨论了社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的双重影响。你应关注年轻运动员在数字环境中可能面临的心理挑战，并在康复过程中将社交媒体使用作为一个潜在影响因素进行考量。
items.titleZh: #Beyondthelikes：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的风险与机遇，指出数字空间可能同时支持或阻碍与幸福感相关的基本心理需求，并呼吁更多研究关注此领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial discusses the dual impact of social media on young athletes' mental health. You should be aware of the psychological challenges young athletes might face in digital environments and consider social media use as a potential influencing factor in their rehabilitation process.
items.limitation: 这是一篇社论，不包含原始研究数据，主要基于现有证据和专家观点进行论述。
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial and does not contain original research data, primarily discussing based on existing evidence and expert opinions.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This editorial discusses the need for technology, health, and performance integration in boxing to address issues like subjective judging, traumatic brain injury, and reliance on intuition over data, especially in light of recent athlete deaths.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论强调了在拳击运动中应用技术改善健康和表现的重要性。你作为康复师，需要意识到高风险运动项目对运动员长期健康带来的挑战，并关注技术如何辅助评估和干预，以降低创伤性脑损伤等风险。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论讨论了拳击运动在主观裁判、高发脑外伤和依赖直觉训练方面面临的挑战，并强调了引入技术以更好地管理冲撞伤害，提升运动员健康与表现的必要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial emphasizes the importance of applying technology to improve health and performance in boxing. As a rehabilitation specialist, you need to be aware of the challenges high-risk sports pose to athletes' long-term health and pay attention to how technology can assist in assessment and intervention to reduce risks like traumatic brain injury.
items.limitation: 这是一篇社论，未提供具体的技术方案或实证研究数据，主要提出观点和未来方向。
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial, providing no specific technological solutions or empirical research data, primarily presenting opinions and future directions.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: This infographic highlights video analysis as a key prerequisite for understanding muscle strain mechanisms in sport, by identifying qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics at or around the time of injury, which helps in developing effective prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这份信息图强调了视频分析在理解运动中肌肉拉伤机制方面的价值。当你需要深入分析复杂运动损伤时，考虑利用视频数据来识别损伤发生时的定性和定量特征，这有助于制定更精准的预防和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 信息图：运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析——不同肌群的定性和定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 这份信息图强调了视频分析在理解运动中肌肉拉伤机制的重要性，通过识别损伤发生时或前后的定性（如接触机制、损伤相关活动）和定量（如关节角度、损伤时机）情境特征，为制定有效的损伤预防和康复策略提供了关键前提。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic highlights the value of video analysis in understanding muscle strain mechanisms in sports. When analyzing complex sports injuries, consider using video data to identify qualitative and quantitative characteristics at the time of injury, which helps in developing more precise prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 信息图本身并非原始研究，而是对已有概念和方法的概括，未提供具体研究数据和结论。
items.limitationEn: The infographic itself is not original research but a summary of existing concepts and methods, without specific research data or conclusions.

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored physiotherapists' experiences treating children with cerebral palsy (CP) experiencing pain. Eight interviews revealed three key themes: facilitating wellbeing through bodily practice, embracing body experiences as central to pain interpretation, and creating alliances based on safety and respect.
items.curatedReason: 本研究通过定性访谈，揭示了物理治疗师在处理脑瘫儿童疼痛时的心理和实践经验，强调了关注儿童整体福祉、以身体体验为中心理解和治疗疼痛，以及建立信任关系的重要性。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是让生活更有意义。”物理治疗师治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛的经验：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师治疗患有疼痛的脑瘫儿童的经验。八次访谈揭示了三个主题：通过身体治疗促进福祉，以身体体验为中心理解和治疗疼痛，以及基于安全、信任和尊重的医患关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals physiotherapists' psychological and practical experiences when treating pain in children with cerebral palsy, emphasizing the importance of focusing on holistic well-being, understanding and treating pain through bodily experiences, and building trust.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果可能不具备广泛代表性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), and its findings may not be broadly representative.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon examined factors related to early access and adherence to physiotherapy services among children with cerebral palsy (CP). Only 38.3% of 94 children accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and showed good adherence (≥50% sessions completed).
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆的研究揭示了当地脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性的障碍。虽然是特定区域数据，但能让你反思自己的临床实践如何能更好地消除障碍、提升依从性。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗的可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项喀麦隆的横断面研究调查了脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性的相关因素。在94名儿童中，仅有38.3%的儿童在5个月前开始物理治疗，且依从性良好（完成≥50%的治疗）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Cameroon highlights barriers to early access and adherence to physiotherapy for children with cerebral palsy in the region. While specific to one area, it prompts reflection on how your own clinical practice can better remove barriers and improve adherence.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且数据来自单一三级转诊中心，可能存在选择偏倚，外部推广性有限。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality and is subject to selection bias due to data from a single tertiary referral center, limiting external generalizability.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) when delivering instructions and feedback during telehealth for children with neurodevelopmental disorders. The study involved six physiotherapists each with two clients.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究能让你了解在远程物理治疗中，如何通过指导和反馈的注意力焦点来优化儿童神经发育障碍的运动学习。它提供了实际实践中的洞察，对你的远程实践很有启发。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点在指导和反馈中的应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究考察了儿科物理治疗师在通过远程医疗为神经发育障碍儿童提供指导和反馈时，如何利用注意力焦点。研究涉及六名物理治疗师，每人有两名患者。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study offers insights into optimizing motor learning for children with neurodevelopmental disorders in telerehabilitation, specifically through focus of attention in instruction and feedback. It provides practical insights that can inform your telerehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性观察性研究，样本量小（6名物理治疗师和12名患者），且结果基于特定地区的治疗中心，外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This exploratory observational study has a small sample size (6 physiotherapists and 12 patients), and its results from specific regional therapy centers limit generalizability.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT), an activity monitor for hospitalized individuals, was validated against video truth data. It demonstrated accuracy in measuring stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 是一种用于住院患者的活动监测器，验证研究显示其在测量步态和活动方面具有良好的准确性。如果你在急性护理环境中工作，可以考虑将这类工具整合到你的患者评估和监测中，以便更客观地量化患者活动水平。
items.titleZh: 验证急性护理患者活动监测器：患者/居民移动追踪器 (PREEMPT)
items.summaryZh: 一项研究验证了用于住院患者的活动监测器 PREEMPT。该设备在10名健康老年人和46名住院患者中，通过与视频数据对比，在测量步长、步数、行走时间、静坐时间和活动时间方面表现出准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: PREEMPT, an activity monitor for hospitalized patients, has shown good accuracy in gait and activity measurements during validation. If you work in acute care, consider integrating such tools into your patient assessment and monitoring to objectively quantify patient activity levels.
items.limitation: 研究样本中包含了健康老年人，这可能影响其在更广泛的急性住院患者群体中的适用性。
items.limitationEn: The study sample included healthy older adults, which may affect its applicability to a broader acute hospitalized patient population.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded, pragmatic randomized controlled trial found that 8-week, twice-weekly physiotherapist-led exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation (TeleCaRe) was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life in cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，尽管基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但它在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次面对面物理治疗。这意味着远程康复对癌症幸存者而言仍有价值，但可能需要更多干预来超越单次咨询的效果。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者盲法、务实的随机对照试验发现，为期8周、每周两次由物理治疗师主导的基于运动的癌症远程康复（TeleCaRe）是安全的，但在改善癌症幸存者健康相关生活质量方面并不优于单次面对面评估和咨询。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial indicates that while exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe, it is not superior to a single session of in-person physiotherapy for improving quality of life. This suggests telerehabilitation remains valuable for cancer survivors but may require more intensive interventions to surpass the impact of a single consultation.
items.limitation: 研究的对照组是单次面对面咨询，而非持续性干预，可能限制了比较结果的临床意义。
items.limitationEn: The control group received a single in-person consultation rather than ongoing intervention, which may limit the clinical significance of the comparative results.

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study aims to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI).
items.curatedReason: 对于中重度TBI患者，这项观察研究提示我们，理解PTA恢复的个体差异是关键。PTA的预测模型仍是挑战，目前没有单一指标能完全取代临床判断。
items.titleZh: 创伤后失忆恢复的个体化预测：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究旨在预测中度至重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者个体从创伤后失忆（PTA）中恢复的情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: For moderate to severe TBI patients, this observational study suggests that understanding individual variability in PTA emergence is key. Predicting PTA remains challenging, and no single metric can fully replace clinical judgment.
items.limitation: 作为一项队列研究，虽然规模较大，但仍需进一步研究以验证其预测模型的准确性和临床实用性。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, despite its large scale, further research is needed to validate the accuracy and clinical utility of its predictive model.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers no additional benefits in muscle strength, disability, and pain intensity compared to conventional low-load exercise (LLE) or high-load exercise (HLE) for individuals with musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 别急着把血流限制训练（BFR）吹上天，这项高质量系统综述和荟萃分析告诉你：低负荷 BFR 和常规低负荷训练在肌力、疼痛和功能障碍改善上基本等效，甚至高负荷训练可能更优。继续把高负荷训练作为金标准。
items.titleZh: 与传统运动相比，血流限制训练在肌肉骨骼康复中是否提供额外益处？一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，与传统低负荷运动或高负荷运动相比，伴有血流限制的低负荷运动（LLE-BFR）在肌肉骨骼疾病患者的肌力、功能障碍和疼痛强度方面并未提供额外益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: Don't overhype blood flow restriction (BFR) training. This high-quality systematic review and meta-analysis indicates that low-load BFR is largely equivalent to conventional low-load exercise for improving muscle strength, pain, and disability, with high-load exercise potentially superior. Continue to prioritize high-load training as the gold standard.
items.limitation: 研究纳入的 RCTs 可能存在异质性，且未明确报告不同肌肉骨骼疾病类型的具体效果差异。
items.limitationEn: The included RCTs may have heterogeneity, and the study did not explicitly report specific efficacy differences across various musculoskeletal disorder types.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A prospective, randomized controlled study in a Swiss ED found high agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between advanced physiotherapists and resident physicians compared to senior physicians for musculoskeletal dysfunctions, supporting APP roles.
items.curatedReason: 在急诊科处理非紧急肌肉骨骼问题上，高级实践物理治疗师（APP）与住院医师在诊断、治疗和出院决策上与资深医师高度一致。这坐实了 APP 在急诊分流和管理中的能力，为你所在机构推动 APP 进驻急诊提供了强有力证据。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍诊断和治疗的一线共识：一项前瞻性随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在瑞士急诊科进行的前瞻性随机对照研究发现，高级物理治疗师与住院医师在肌肉骨骼功能障碍的诊断、治疗和出院决策上与资深医师高度一致，支持了高级实践物理治疗师（APP）的角色。
items.curatedReasonEn: Advanced Physiotherapy Practitioners (APPs) show high agreement with senior physicians on diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions for non-urgent musculoskeletal issues in the emergency department (ED). This confirms the capability of APPs in ED triage and management, providing strong evidence for promoting APP integration into EDs at your institution.
items.limitation: 该研究为单中心随机对照试验，可能存在地域性限制，结果在其他医疗系统或文化背景下的普适性需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This single-center randomized controlled trial may have regional limitations, and the generalizability of its findings to other healthcare systems or cultural contexts requires further validation.

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: A validation study involving 18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults compared six ActiGraph accelerometers and pressure insoles for step count accuracy against an instrumented treadmill. It found that accuracy varied across walking speeds and sensor locations.
items.curatedReason: 如果你在卒中患者或健康成人中使用可穿戴设备进行步数测量，这项验证研究告诉你，不同传感器配置（位置和算法）会影响准确性。在选择设备和算法时，务必考虑其在不同步行速度下的表现。
items.titleZh: 通过多种可穿戴传感器配置量化身体活动步数估计：一项卒中后和健康成年人的验证研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 18 名卒中后患者和 18 名健康成年人的验证研究，比较了六种 ActiGraph 加速度计和压力鞋垫在步数估计方面的准确性，并与仪器化跑台进行对照。研究发现准确性因步行速度和传感器位置而异。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you're using wearable sensors for step counting in stroke patients or healthy adults, this validation study shows that different sensor configurations (placement and algorithms) affect accuracy. When selecting devices and algorithms, consider their performance across various walking speeds.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（N=36），可能限制了其结果的普适性，且仅评估了特定类型的加速度计。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (N=36) may limit the generalizability of its findings, and it only evaluated specific types of accelerometers.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) grouped into three domains (functioning, general well-being, and social/environmental factors) and corresponding measures (PROMs) was developed for pediatric physical therapy through focus groups, interviews, a scoping review, and expert panel assessment.
items.curatedReason: 这份 PROMs 核心集为儿科物理治疗提供了一套标准化、适合日常实践的患者报告结局测量工具。它能帮助你更好地在临床、研究和质量评估中捕捉儿童患者及其家长的真实需求和感受，提升以患者为中心的护理水平。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 通过焦点小组、访谈、范围界定综述和专家小组评估，儿科物理治疗开发了一套包含九个患者报告结局（PROs）的核心集，分为三个领域（功能、总体幸福感和社会/环境因素），并包含相应的测量工具（PROMs）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This core set of PROMs provides a standardized, practice-ready collection of patient-reported outcome measures for pediatric physical therapy. It will help you better capture the real needs and perceptions of child patients and their parents in clinical practice, research, and quality assessment, enhancing patient-centered care.
items.limitation: PROs 和 PROMs 的选择过程涉及专家共识和问卷调查，可能存在主观性，且尚未在实际临床中进行广泛验证。
items.limitationEn: The selection process for PROs and PROMs involved expert consensus and surveys, which may introduce subjectivity, and the set has not yet been widely validated in clinical practice.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review comparing upper limb rehabilitation strategies in chronic stroke patients with and without contralateral C7 nerve transfer identified significant evidence gaps regarding rehabilitation dose, content, and delivery models between technology-assisted rehabilitation and CC7 studies.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后上肢功能障碍的康复路径分化为神经转移手术和高剂量康复两种。这份系统综述强调了目前缺乏直接比较这两种策略康复方案和结果的证据，提示你需要关注这两种途径在剂量、内容和交付模式上的差异。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的差距：一项关于伴有和不伴有神经转移患者证据的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项比较慢性卒中患者（伴有和不伴有对侧 C7 神经转移）上肢康复策略的系统综述，发现了技术辅助康复与 CC7 研究之间在康复剂量、内容和交付模式方面存在显著证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: Rehabilitation pathways for post-stroke upper limb dysfunction diverge into nerve transfer surgery and high-dose rehabilitation. This systematic review highlights the current lack of direct comparative evidence for these two strategies' rehabilitation protocols and outcomes, suggesting you should pay attention to differences in dose, content, and delivery models across these two approaches.
items.limitation: 系统综述指出证据存在空白，未能提供神经转移与技术辅助康复方案之间直接比较的实证结果。
items.limitationEn: The systematic review identifies gaps in evidence and does not provide empirical results for direct comparisons between nerve transfer and technology-assisted rehabilitation protocols.

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A multi-method summit-Delphi consensus process involving 83 participants from seven governing bodies of tennis and the broader ecosystem generated recommendations for mental healthcare provision and wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors.
items.curatedReason: 通过多方共识，网球界对精英运动员（包括青少年）的心理健康护理和促进制定了建议。这些建议能指导你如何在网球康复中融入更全面的心理健康支持，而不只是局限于身体层面。
items.titleZh: 网球运动中的心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 一项涉及网球七大管理机构及更广泛生态系统 83 名参与者的多方法峰会-德尔菲共识流程，为精英网球运动员（包括青少年）的心理健康护理和健康促进制定了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: Through multi-stakeholder consensus, the tennis community has developed recommendations for mental healthcare and wellness promotion among elite athletes (including juniors). These recommendations can guide you in integrating more comprehensive mental health support into tennis rehabilitation, beyond just physical aspects.

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients in a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital found that musculoskeletal disorders were predominantly managed in females (5:1 ratio) with a mean age of 47.8 ± 25.7 years, providing local insights into prevalence, patterns, and costs of physiotherapy-managed cases.
items.curatedReason: 这份尼日利亚的十年回顾性研究为当地肌肉骨骼疾病的物理治疗实践提供了基线数据，但跨文化普适性有限。其主要价值在于为非洲地区康复服务规划提供了背景信息。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病：患病率、模式、治疗结果及成本
items.summaryZh: 一项针对尼日利亚大学教学医院 1582 名患者的十年回顾性研究发现，肌肉骨骼疾病主要发生在女性（男女比例 5:1），平均年龄 47.8 ± 25.7 岁，为了解当地物理治疗管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式和成本提供了数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year retrospective study from Nigeria offers baseline data on physiotherapy practice for musculoskeletal disorders in the region, but its cross-cultural generalizability is limited. Its primary value lies in providing contextual information for rehabilitation service planning in Africa.
items.limitation: 研究为单一中心的回顾性数据分析，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题，且仅限于尼日利亚一地，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center retrospective study, which may have selection bias and data completeness issues, and its findings are limited to Nigeria, thus generalizability is restricted.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial argues for proactive organizational leadership in athlete mental health, moving beyond reactive crisis management to establish foundational support and preventative strategies, given that up to one-third of elite athletes report mental health symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 运动员心理健康需要组织层面的领导力，不能只在危机时才介入。你应该推动你的运动组织或团队建立更积极的预防策略，而非仅仅事后治疗。
items.titleZh: 奠定基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论主张运动员心理健康需要积极的组织领导力，超越被动的危机管理，建立基础支持和预防策略，鉴于高达三分之一的精英运动员报告有心理健康症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: Athlete mental health requires organizational leadership, not just reactive interventions during crises. You should advocate for your sports organization or team to establish more proactive prevention strategies rather than merely post-hoc treatment.

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This N-of-1 trial protocol outlines an mHealth intervention using an ABA' design to promote physical activity and nutrition in older cancer patients (≥ 70 years). It integrates ecological momentary assessment with accelerometry to improve health behaviors over an 8-week intervention phase.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项 N-of-1 试验方案，目前还只是方案阶段，并不能提供任何干预效果的证据。它提示我们，未来在老年癌症患者的健康行为干预中，可以探索结合移动健康和个体化设计的潜力。但请注意，在结果发布前，不要对此抱有过高期待。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者身体活动和营养的移动健康干预：N-of-1 试验方案
items.summaryZh: 该 N-of-1 试验方案旨在通过 ABA' 设计的移动健康干预，促进老年癌症患者（≥ 70 岁）的身体活动和营养。它将生态瞬时评估与加速度计相结合，在 8 周干预期内改善健康行为。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is just an N-of-1 trial protocol, offering no evidence of intervention effectiveness yet. It hints at the potential for mHealth and individualized designs in future health behavior interventions for older cancer patients. However, temper your expectations until results are actually published.
items.limitation: 本研究为一项 N-of-1 试验方案，尚未产生实际研究结果，其方法学设计可能因个体差异而存在局限。
items.limitationEn: This is an N-of-1 trial protocol and has not yet produced actual research results. Its methodological design may have limitations due to individual variability.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients (5417 assessments) demonstrated that even incomplete cognitive assessments can yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables, supporting group-level stratification.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究提醒我们，卒中后康复中的认知评估常不完整。即便数据不全，你仍可从现有神经心理学数据中提取有临床意义的认知-临床关系，并支持分层管理。
items.titleZh: 急性期后卒中康复中不完整的认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项对 2654 名急性期后卒中患者（5417 次评估）进行的回顾性队列研究表明，即使认知评估不完整，仍能从常规神经心理学数据中提取出具有临床可解释性的认知、临床和情境变量之间的关系，并支持进行群体分层。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study highlights that cognitive assessments in post-stroke rehabilitation are often incomplete. Even with incomplete data, you can still extract clinically interpretable cognitive-clinical relationships from routine neuropsychological data and support group-level stratification.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，数据收集可能不一致，且结果可能受到未测量混杂因素的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, data collection may be inconsistent, and results may be affected by unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability who found exercise therapy effectively facilitated by figure-of-eight taping, addressing discomfort, pain, and clicking sensation.
items.curatedReason: 对于多向性肩关节不稳，八字形贴扎可能是一种辅助手段，帮助患者更好地进行运动疗法。但这是单病例报告，别把它的效用放大。
items.titleZh: 八字形贴扎联合康复训练治疗学龄空手道女运动员多向性肩关节不稳一例报告
items.summaryZh: 一份病例报告描述了一名 12 岁空手道女运动员的多向性肩关节不稳，通过八字形贴扎联合运动疗法，有效改善了不适、疼痛和弹响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Figure-of-eight taping might be a useful adjunct for multidirectional shoulder instability, facilitating exercise therapy. However, this is a single case report, so avoid overstating its efficacy.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，其结果无法外推至其他患者群体，需要更多高质量研究验证其有效性。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, and its findings cannot be generalized to other patient populations. More high-quality research is needed to validate its effectiveness.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries found that mandatory bundled payment for lower extremity joint replacement significantly affected the delivery of preoperative rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 针对美国Medicare 62,217名受益人的分析显示，强制性下肢关节置换打包支付模式，确实显著影响了术前康复（prehabilitation）的提供。如果你在美国执业，必须认识到这种支付政策对你提供术前康复服务的直接限制，并需调整服务模式以适应报销变化。
items.titleZh: 强制性打包支付对下肢关节置换术前康复提供的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项对 62,217 名 Medicare 受益人的双重差分分析发现，强制性下肢关节置换打包支付对术前康复服务的提供产生了显著影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries in the US confirms that mandatory bundled payments for lower extremity joint replacement significantly impacted prehabilitation delivery. If you practice in the US, you must acknowledge this direct limitation on your ability to provide prehabilitation services and adjust your practice model to align with reimbursement changes.
items.limitation: 本研究基于医疗保险索赔数据，可能无法捕捉到所有术前康复的非报销形式或非 Medicare 患者群体。
items.limitationEn: This study is based on Medicare claims data and may not capture all forms of non-reimbursed prehabilitation or non-Medicare patient populations.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: An editorial provides an update to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, emphasizing recent advances, current evidence, and persistent challenges in prevention, individualized management, evolving surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论更新了 2018 年国际奥委会（IOC）关于儿童 ACL 损伤的共识声明。它强调了预防、个体化管理和长期整体护理的最新进展和持续挑战。你可以将此作为你向青少年运动员、家长和教练提供咨询时的最新参考。
items.titleZh: 2018 年国际奥委会儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理愿景
items.summaryZh: 一篇社论更新了 2018 年国际奥委会关于儿童 ACL 损伤的共识声明，强调了预防、个体化管理决策、不断演变的手术策略和长期整体护理方面的最新进展、现有证据和持续挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial updates the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries. It highlights recent advances and persistent challenges in prevention, individualized management, and long-term holistic care. You can use this as a current reference when advising young athletes, parents, and coaches.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis identified the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across various training levels and assessment methods, also identifying moderators associated with these prevalence estimates.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率，并识别了相关调节因素。这是你识别和管理运动员这类心理健康问题的重要依据，应将其纳入运动康复的全面评估框架。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析确定了不同训练水平和评估方法下运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率，并识别了与这些患病率估计相关的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides clear data on the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes and their associated moderators. As a physical therapist, identifying these issues and integrating them into a comprehensive sports rehabilitation assessment framework is crucial; you cannot overlook the psychological health risks in athletes.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析的异质性可能很高，不同评估方法和训练水平的纳入可能影响结果的统一性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in meta-analysis may be high, and the inclusion of various assessment methods and training levels could affect result consistency.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients determined subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking at discharge after inpatient stroke rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心队列研究为 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）在卒中患者出院时预测独立行走提供了分亚型（缺血性 vs 出血性）的最佳截断值。在入院评估时，你可以用这些截断值来辅助判断患者预后。
items.titleZh: 卒中住院康复中 Berg 平衡量表预测独立行走的分亚型最佳截断值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 565 名卒中患者的多中心回顾性队列研究确定了 Berg 平衡量表在卒中住院康复后预测独立行走的分亚型最佳截断值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter cohort study provides subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) to predict independent walking at discharge for stroke patients. You can use these cut-off values during admission assessment to help determine patient prognosis.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，尽管有内部验证，但仍存在潜在的混杂因素，且结果基于韩国人群，外推时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, and despite internal validation, potential confounders exist, and results are based on a Korean population, requiring caution in generalization.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective surveillance study monitored 4,450 athletes during the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, reporting 535 injuries (incidence of 8.6 per 1000 athlete days) and highlighting Taekwondo (27.3) and football 5-a-side (22.3) as high-risk sports.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病流行病学研究揭示了不同运动项目特有的伤病风险。你可以将这些数据作为残疾运动员运动康复和预防策略制定的依据，特别是关注跆拳道和五人制足球等高风险项目。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病发生率：疫情后趋势与特定运动风险
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性监测研究在 2024 年巴黎残奥会期间监测了 4,450 名运动员，报告了 535 例伤病（发生率为每千运动员日 8.6），并指出跆拳道（27.3）和五人制足球（22.3）为高风险运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This epidemiological study of injuries and illnesses at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games reveals sport-specific injury risks. You can use these data as a basis for developing rehabilitation and prevention strategies for Para athletes, especially focusing on high-risk sports like Taekwondo and football 5-a-side.
items.limitation: 本研究为描述性流行病学，未能深入探讨伤病发生的具体机制或干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This descriptive epidemiological study did not delve into the specific mechanisms of injury occurrence or the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies, including 29 RCTs, exploring the range, characteristics, and outcome measures of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, which is a primary global cause of disability.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述（scoping review）不是系统综述，但它通过梳理36项研究（含29个RCT），清晰地呈现了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的全貌。你可以从中了解现有干预措施的多样性及常用的评估方法，辅助临床决策。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的范围界定综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围界定综述从 36 项研究（含 29 项 RCT）中探索了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的范围、特征及结局测量指标，膝骨关节炎是全球致残的主要原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: While not a systematic review, this scoping review of 36 studies (including 29 RCTs) clearly outlines the landscape of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis. Use it to understand the diversity of current interventions and common assessment methods, informing your clinical decisions.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围界定综述，侧重于识别和描述文献，而非对证据进行质量评估或综合。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review focused on identifying and describing the literature, not on quality assessment or synthesis of evidence.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: In a within-subject repeated-measures study, 27 stroke patients walked under no prioritization, spatial prioritization, and temporal prioritization conditions. The study investigated the effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探索了空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者步态参数的不同影响。你可以借鉴其设计思路，考虑在临床实践中针对不同步态问题，更精细地调整口头指令的侧重点。
items.titleZh: 空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者时空步态参数的影响：一项自身重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项自身重复测量研究中，27 名卒中患者在无优先、空间优先和时间优先三种条件下行走，研究探索了空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者时空步态参数的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the differential effects of spatial versus temporal prioritized verbal instructions on gait parameters in stroke patients. You can learn from its design to refine the focus of your verbal instructions for different gait issues in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本（27 名患者）的自身重复测量研究，尽管有随机条件，但仍需更大规模试验验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample (27 patients) within-subject repeated-measures study, and despite randomized conditions, larger trials are needed for validation.

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental outpatient study in Thailand examined the feasibility of integrating a structured music therapy protocol into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia, exploring preliminary outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项准实验研究验证了音乐疗法整合到卒中失语症常规康复中的可行性。如果你考虑将音乐疗法作为辅助手段，这提供了初步的现实世界证据。
items.titleZh: 将音乐疗法整合至卒中后失语症常规言语康复的可行性：一项现实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 泰国一项准实验门诊研究考察了将结构化音乐疗法方案整合到卒中后失语症常规言语治疗中的可行性，并探索了初步结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This quasi-experimental study validates the feasibility of integrating music therapy into routine rehabilitation for post-stroke aphasia. If you are considering music therapy as an adjunctive intervention, this provides preliminary real-world evidence.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验设计，对照组接受的治疗时间可能少于实验组，存在剂量不均的混淆因素，且样本量较小。
items.limitationEn: This quasi-experimental study may have a confounding factor of unequal dosage, as the control group likely received less therapeutic contact time than the experimental group, and it involved a small sample size.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: This editorial discusses that monitoring an athlete's performance-state after return-to-sport following an ACL injury remains a significant challenge, despite substantial focus on return-to-sport testing practices.
items.curatedReason: 文章指出，ACL 损伤运动员重返赛场后的表现状态监测仍是挑战。作为物理治疗师，你需要认识到现有重返赛场标准后的空白，并考虑如何在实践中更好地评估和支持运动员的长期表现恢复。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤研究与实践中，监测运动员重返赛场后的表现状态是重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论指出，尽管重返赛场测试实践备受关注，但在 ACL 损伤后重返赛场的运动员表现状态监测仍是一个重大挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article highlights that monitoring athletes' performance state after returning to sport following ACL injury remains a significant challenge. As a physical therapist, you need to recognize the gaps beyond existing return-to-sport criteria and consider how to better assess and support athletes' long-term performance recovery in practice.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with confirmed acute respiratory infections identified factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes, including time to return-to-training (median 3.5 days), return-to-full-training (median 8 days), and return-to-full-performance (median 11 days).
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究识别了运动员急性呼吸道感染后重返运动（RTS）结局的相关因素。你可以参考这些因素，在管理运动员呼吸道感染后恢复期时，更精准地制定 RTT、RTFT 和 RTFP 计划。
items.titleZh: 运动员病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后重返运动结局的相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 114 名确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究，识别了重返运动结局的相关因素，包括重返训练时间（中位数 3.5 天）、重返全面训练时间（中位数 8 天）和重返最佳表现时间（中位数 11 天）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study identifies factors associated with return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes following acute respiratory infections in athletes. You can use these factors to more precisely formulate RTT, RTFT, and RTFP plans when managing athletes' recovery from respiratory infections.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量为 114 例，存在单中心或特定人群的偏倚风险，且结果的普遍性可能受限于不同的病原体类型。
items.limitationEn: This study included 114 cases, carrying a risk of single-center or specific population bias, and the generalizability of the findings might be limited by different pathogen types.

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists described their knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, revealing widely spread areas of interest.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对南非物理治疗师的调查揭示了他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践现状。你可以参考其发现，审视自身在运动学习理论应用上的差距或共性。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度与实践
items.summaryZh: 一项对 40 名南非物理治疗师的调查描述了他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践，显示出广泛的兴趣领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey among South African physical therapists reveals their current knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. You can use its findings to reflect on your own gaps or commonalities in applying motor learning theory.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性调查，样本量小（40 人），且仅限于南非物理治疗师，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational survey with a small sample size (40 participants) and is limited to South African physical therapists, restricting generalizability.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: This systematic review analyzed the effectiveness of different physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis (EDSS ≤6.0), confirming its positive influence.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述确认了体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的积极影响。在你的临床实践中，可将不同形式的运动作为非药物干预的首选，以改善患者生活质量。
items.titleZh: 体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛影响的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述分析了不同体育锻炼干预措施对EDSS评分≤6.0的多发性硬化症患者痉挛的影响，证实了其积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review confirms the positive impact of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis. In your clinical practice, you can prioritize various forms of exercise as non-pharmacological interventions to improve patients' quality of life.
items.limitation: 纳入的RCT研究可能存在异质性，且各运动干预方案的细节差异较大。
items.limitationEn: Included RCTs may have heterogeneity, and detailed exercise intervention protocols varied considerably.

items.title: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summary: GaitEncoder is a generative foundation model of walking kinematics for diverse clinical applications and pathologies, enabling actionable insights from smartphone video-based gait analysis using eight aggregated gait datasets.
items.curatedReason: GaitEncoder作为基于智能手机视频的步态运动学基础模型，展示了其在多种临床应用和病理学中的潜力。这可能预示着未来移动端步态分析在个性化康复治疗中的广泛应用，值得你密切关注。
items.titleZh: GaitEncoder：一个用于多种临床应用和病理的步态运动学基础模型
items.titleEn: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summaryZh: GaitEncoder是一个生成式步态运动学基础模型，通过聚合八个步态数据集，利用智能手机视频步态分析，为多种临床应用和病理学提供可操作的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: GaitEncoder, as a smartphone video-based gait kinematics foundation model, demonstrates its potential across diverse clinical applications and pathologies. This may signal the widespread future use of mobile gait analysis in personalized rehabilitation, warranting your close attention.
items.limitation: 预印本阶段，尚未经过同行评审，结果存在不确定性。
items.limitationEn: Preprint stage, not yet peer-reviewed, results are subject to uncertainty.

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: This study developed evidence-based physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection, covering six different megaprostheses through literature search and expert consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这份共识性协议为肿瘤切除后使用巨型假体的患者提供了六种不同假体的物理治疗方案，你可以此为基础制定个性化康复计划。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究通过文献搜索和专家共识，为骨肿瘤切除并植入巨型假体的患者开发了基于证据的物理治疗方案，涵盖了六种不同类型的巨型假体。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus protocol provides physical therapy plans for six different megaprostheses after bone tumor resection, which you can use as a basis for personalized rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 共识性协议基于探索性文献搜索和专家意见，缺乏随机对照研究的最高等级证据。
items.limitationEn: The consensus protocol is based on an explorative literature search and expert opinion, lacking the highest level of evidence from randomized controlled trials.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored expectations and experiences of patients with hip or knee osteoarthritis regarding PT-led triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic, identifying areas for improved patient participation and expectation fulfillment.
items.curatedReason: 患者对物理治疗师主导的分诊评估的期望和体验是影响依从性的关键。了解这些定性反馈，有助于你优化分诊流程并提高患者满意度。
items.titleZh: 膝关节和髋关节骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了瑞典骨科诊所中膝关节或髋关节骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验，旨在识别提高患者参与度和满足度的领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patient expectations and experiences with PT-led triage assessments are crucial for adherence. Understanding this qualitative feedback can help you optimize triage processes and improve patient satisfaction.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia) and objective measures of balance and gait in hemiparetic individuals.
items.curatedReason: 这项生物力学分析进一步明确了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍与平衡步态之间的具体关联。这有助于你更精准地评估患者功能受损，并制定针对性干预计划。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍（包括足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉）与平衡和步态客观测量指标之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This biomechanical analysis further clarifies the specific associations between lower limb proprioceptive dysfunction and balance-gait in hemiparetic patients. This can help you more precisely assess functional impairments and develop targeted intervention plans.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，且可能存在未测量混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, cannot establish causality, and unmeasured confounding factors may exist.

items.title: "Most inactive in my life": patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure.
items.summary: This qualitative study conducted in-depth interviews with 22 adults (aged 27-85) with heart failure to identify patient-reported barriers and facilitators to cardiac rehabilitation participation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入揭示了心力衰竭患者参与心脏康复的主要障碍。了解患者视角下的“不活跃”原因，能帮助你设计更具患者中心化的干预方案，提高康复依从性。
items.titleZh: “我一生中最不活跃的时候”：心力衰竭患者报告的心脏康复障碍
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究对22名（27-85岁）心力衰竭成年人进行了深度访谈，旨在识别患者报告的心脏康复参与障碍和促进因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study provides in-depth insights into the main barriers to cardiac rehabilitation for heart failure patients. Understanding the reasons for 'inactivity' from the patient's perspective can help you design more patient-centered interventions and improve rehabilitation adherence.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（N=22），结果不能直接量化或泛化到所有心衰患者。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size (N=22); results cannot be directly quantified or generalized to all heart failure patients.

items.title: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: This scoping review characterized populations and clinical contexts where the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) has been applied, mapped assessment protocol heterogeneity, and identified methodological gaps in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 增强型步态变异性指数（eGVI）作为跌倒风险和活动障碍的综合指标，在神经和老年康复中潜力巨大。了解其应用范围和方法学差距，能指导你更有效地利用该工具进行评估。
items.titleZh: 增强型步态变异性指数在神经和老年康复中的应用：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述旨在描述增强型步态变异性指数（eGVI）在神经和老年康复中应用的患者人群和临床背景，绘制评估方案异质性，并识别方法学上的差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) shows great potential as a composite measure of fall risk and mobility impairment in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation. Understanding its applications and methodological gaps can guide you in using this tool more effectively for assessment.
items.limitation: 范围综述并非系统综述，可能未穷尽所有相关研究，且不进行质量评估。
items.limitationEn: A scoping review is not a systematic review, may not exhaust all relevant studies, and does not assess quality.

items.title: Correction: ACTIVATE: physical activity assessment, prescription and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals - a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: This correction refers to the ACTIVATE consensus study by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy, focusing on physical activity assessment, prescription, and promotion in clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 国际运动物理治疗联合会（IFSPT）的这项共识研究强调了医疗专业人员在临床实践中评估、开具和推广体育活动的重要性。它重申了物理治疗师在促进行动健康方面的核心角色。
items.titleZh: 勘误：ACTIVATE：国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的医疗专业人员在临床实践中体育活动评估、处方和推广的共识研究
items.titleEn: Correction: ACTIVATE: physical activity assessment, prescription and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals - a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy
items.summaryZh: 这项勘误涉及国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的ACTIVATE共识研究，该研究关注医疗专业人员在临床实践中体育活动的评估、处方和推广。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus study by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy (IFSPT) underscores the importance of healthcare professionals assessing, prescribing, and promoting physical activity in clinical practice. It reaffirms the central role of physical therapists in promoting active health.

items.title: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey assessed knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding sudden cardiac arrest preparedness among professional football stakeholders in Cameroon, identifying system-level gaps in low-resource sport settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了非洲足球运动中突发性心脏骤停（SCA）防范的系统性不足，特别是在低资源环境下。这提醒你作为运动物理治疗师，需要关注并倡导改进运动现场急救准备。
items.titleZh: 非洲足球突发性心脏骤停防范：喀麦隆的证据及对全球体育运动的启示
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查评估了喀麦隆职业足球利益相关者对突发性心脏骤停防范的知识、态度和实践，旨在识别低资源体育环境中的系统性差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals systemic deficiencies in sudden cardiac arrest (SCA) preparedness in African football, especially in low-resource settings. As a sports physical therapist, this reminds you to focus on and advocate for improved on-field emergency preparedness.
items.limitation: 横断面调查，仅能提供关联性而非因果关系；数据来源于自述，可能存在报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional survey, only provides associations not causality; data is self-reported and may have reporting bias.

items.title: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summary: This study investigated changes and temporal trends in the intrinsic capacity of individuals across 32 countries to understand the state of healthy aging.
items.curatedReason: 了解内在能力（Intrinsic Capacity）在32个国家的趋势和变化，能让你对全球健康老龄化的进展有更宏观的认识。这有助于你更好地定位物理治疗在促进老年患者功能维持和提升方面的作用。
items.titleZh: 内在能力趋势：来自32个国家的证据
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了32个国家个体内在能力的变化和时间趋势，旨在了解健康老龄化的现状。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding the trends and changes in Intrinsic Capacity across 32 countries gives you a broader perspective on global healthy aging progress. This helps you better position physical therapy's role in maintaining and enhancing functional abilities in older patients.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，若为观察性研究则无法建立因果关系，且数据来源和收集方法可能存在异质性。
items.limitationEn: Study design is not specified; if observational, it cannot establish causality, and data sources and collection methods may be heterogeneous.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summary: This cross-sectional analysis compared food insecurity prevalence in adults with spinal cord injury versus matched controls, identifying demographic and socioeconomic correlates and examining its association with BMI.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了脊髓损伤患者食物不安全问题及其与BMI的关联，这提示你在处理此类患者时，需要考虑食物获取和营养状况，将其纳入整体康复管理的一部分。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤个体食物不安全及其与BMI的关联：一项横断面分析
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面分析比较了脊髓损伤成年人与匹配对照组食物不安全的患病率，识别了人口社会学和经济学相关因素，并考察了食物不安全与体重指数（BMI）的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals food insecurity issues and its association with BMI in individuals with spinal cord injury. This suggests that when treating such patients, you need to consider food access and nutritional status as part of their holistic rehabilitation management.
items.limitation: 横断面设计无法推断因果关系，且数据主要依赖自述，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional design cannot infer causality, and data relies mainly on self-report, potentially leading to recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia.
items.summary: This institution-based cross-sectional study in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia, assessed physiotherapy service utilization and associated factors among stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 埃塞俄比亚这项观察研究提示，在资源有限地区，卒中患者的物理治疗利用率仍是挑战。作为同行，这提醒我们不同文化和经济背景下，服务可及性远非普遍，需要更多针对性的地方策略。
items.titleZh: 埃塞俄比亚西北部贡德尔市卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用率及相关因素
items.summaryZh: 这项基于机构的横断面研究评估了埃塞俄比亚西北部贡德尔市卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用率及其相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study from Ethiopia suggests that physiotherapy utilization remains a challenge for stroke survivors in resource-limited settings. It reminds us, as peers, that service accessibility is far from universal across different cultural and economic contexts, necessitating more localized strategies.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法确定因果关系，且数据主要依赖患者自述，可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study cannot determine causality, and data primarily relies on patient self-report, which may have recall bias.

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program improved 6-minute walk test distance and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity at 6 months post-TIA or mild stroke, compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）后整合心血管康复的益处，在功能能力和身体活动方面，非劣于常规护理且持续 6 个月。这意味着你可以将心血管康复作为这些患者的重要干预手段，改善其长期预后。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中的有效性：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（n=140）发现，与常规护理相比，为期 6 周的心血管康复计划在 TIA 或轻度卒中后 6 个月显著改善了 6 分钟步行试验距离和中高强度体力活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation post-TIA or mild stroke demonstrates non-inferiority to usual care in functional exercise capacity and physical activity, sustained over 6 months. This indicates you can confidently incorporate cardiovascular rehabilitation as a key intervention to improve long-term outcomes for these patients.
items.limitation: 研究未详细说明干预的具体组成和强度，可能影响结果的可推广性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not detail the specific components and intensity of the intervention, which may limit generalizability.

items.title: Cross-Education Effect on Force Production Capacity After Unilateral Resistance Training in Clinical Populations: A Systematic Review with Meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review with meta-analysis established the cross-education effect after unilateral resistance training (CE-URT) in clinical populations, including those with musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke, demonstrating force production gains in contralateral non-trained muscles.
items.curatedReason: 单侧阻力训练后的交叉教育效应（CE-URT）在临床人群中已得到系统性证实，可提升对侧未训练肌肉的力量。这支持你在单侧损伤或制动情况下，通过训练健侧来维持或改善患侧功能，为康复提供新的策略。
items.titleZh: 单侧阻力训练后对临床人群力量产生能力的交叉教育效应：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析证实了单侧阻力训练（CE-URT）在临床人群（包括肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中后偏瘫患者）中的交叉教育效应，表明对侧未训练肌肉的力量有所增加。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-education effect after unilateral resistance training (CE-URT) is systematically confirmed in clinical populations, enhancing force production in the contralateral untrained limb. This supports training the uninjured side to maintain or improve function in the affected limb during unilateral injury or immobilization, offering a novel strategy in rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体效应量数字，也未提及证据分级。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific effect size numbers or mention evidence grading.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated the cost-effectiveness of inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) versus skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) for stroke survivors in the US, showing IRFs to be more cost-effective from a payer perspective by simulating 90-day outcomes, including mortality and community discharge.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医疗支付方的角度来看，卒中后急性期康复，入住康复医院（IRF）比技能护理机构（SNF）更具成本效益。这为你与支付方沟通，以及为患者选择康复路径提供了有力的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方角度看卒中急性后期康复的成本效益：康复医院与技能护理机构。
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型评估了美国卒中幸存者入住康复医院（IRF）与技能护理机构（SNF）进行急性后期康复的成本效益，通过模拟 90 天结局（包括死亡率和社区出院率），显示 IRF 从支付方角度更具成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a US healthcare payer perspective, inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) are more cost-effective than skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) for post-acute stroke rehabilitation. This provides strong evidence to support your discussions with payers and choices for patient rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型假设和输入数据的准确性。
items.limitationEn: This study used a decision analytic model for simulation, and results depend on the accuracy of model assumptions and input data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A systematic review of 22 studies identified psychological and social impacts as key psychosocial effects of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke, affecting 645 informants.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽困难的社会心理影响远超生理层面，会严重影响患者情绪和社会参与。你需要将这些非生理因素纳入评估和干预计划，以提供更全面的康复支持。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难的社会心理影响：一项定性证据综合。
items.summaryZh: 一项对 22 项研究的系统综述发现，心理和社会影响是卒中后吞咽困难的关键社会心理效应，影响了 645 名信息提供者。
items.curatedReasonEn: The psychosocial impacts of post-stroke eating and drinking difficulties extend beyond physical impairment, significantly affecting emotional well-being and social participation. Incorporate these non-physical factors into your assessment and intervention plans to provide more holistic rehabilitation support.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量和综合证据的确定性未在摘要中明确报告。
items.limitationEn: Methodological quality of included studies and certainty of synthesized evidence were not explicitly reported in the abstract.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (n=333) found that sarcopenia significantly increased the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years of anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF).
items.curatedReason: 颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后，肌少症会增加 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。在评估 ACDF 术后患者时，务必考虑肌少症这一风险因素，并加强相关干预。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究（n=333）发现，肌少症显著增加了颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内影像学邻近节段退变的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). When evaluating post-ACDF patients, it is crucial to consider sarcopenia as a risk factor and strengthen related interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may be subject to selection bias and data completeness issues.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study (n=72) found that a 12-week Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure intervention significantly improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia.
items.curatedReason: 为期 12 周的体感游戏（exergaming）干预能显著改善机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结局。这提示你可以在长期护理机构中，将体感游戏作为一种低成本、多益处的干预手段，以综合管理肌少症。
items.titleZh: 机构养老老年肌少症患者体感游戏的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局。
items.summaryZh: 这项务实准实验研究（n=72）发现，为期 12 周的任天堂 Switch Ring Fit Adventure 体感游戏干预显著改善了机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention significantly improves physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. This suggests you can integrate exergaming into long-term care facilities as a low-cost, multi-benefit intervention for comprehensive sarcopenia management.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验性设计，非随机化，可能存在选择偏倚和无法完全控制混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This study used a quasi-experimental design, which is non-randomized and may be subject to selection bias and unaddressed confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers were significantly associated with lower physical activity levels.
items.curatedReason: 肥胖女性的膝关节症状、功能受限和活动障碍与体力活动水平呈负相关。在临床评估肥胖女性的体力活动水平时，要综合考虑这些因素，才能制定更精准的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的体力活动：疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力。
items.summaryZh: 这项对 85 名肥胖女性进行的横断面研究发现，功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与较低的体力活动水平显著相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee symptoms, functional limitations, and perceived barriers are negatively associated with physical activity in women with obesity. When assessing physical activity levels in obese women, consider these factors holistically to develop more precise intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This feasibility study examined the application of Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) for home-living stroke survivors in a Danish neurorehabilitation center, reporting on recruitment, dose, fidelity, and perceived value.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法在丹麦社区神经康复环境中对卒中幸存者是可行的。这提示你可以考虑将此方法引入你的神经康复实践，尤其是在认知功能相对完好的居家卒中患者中。
items.titleZh: 认知导向日常职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦市政神经康复环境中应用的初步可行性研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项可行性研究评估了认知导向日常职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦神经康复中心对居家卒中幸存者的应用，报告了招募、剂量、依从性和感知价值等方面。
items.curatedReasonEn: The CO-OP approach is feasible for stroke survivors in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation setting. This suggests you could consider incorporating this method into your neurorehabilitation practice, particularly for home-dwelling stroke patients with relatively intact cognitive function.
items.limitation: 本研究为单组前瞻性设计，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This study used a single-group pre-post design, lacking a control group to evaluate the intervention's actual efficacy.

items.title: Blood pressure levels and clinically meaningful changes during inpatient rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: insights from the Dutch Spinal Cord Injury Database.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (n=1286) from the Dutch SCI Database identified associations between blood pressure and demographic, injury, and medication characteristics at admission, and examined changes in BP and heart rate during inpatient rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤（SCI）患者住院康复期间的血压水平与多种特征相关，且 admission-to-discharge 之间会有变化。了解这些关联有助于你更精准地管理 SCI 患者的心血管风险，并优化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤住院康复期间的血压水平和临床有意义的变化：来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的见解。
items.summaryZh: 这项来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的回顾性队列研究（n=1286）识别了入院时血压与人口统计学、损伤和用药特征之间的关联，并检查了住院康复期间血压和心率的变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood pressure levels in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) during inpatient rehabilitation are associated with various characteristics and change between admission and discharge. Understanding these associations can help you more accurately manage cardiovascular risks in SCI patients and optimize rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和数据完整性偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may be subject to confounding factors and data completeness bias.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This review emphasizes the importance of identifying and treating early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA) as a critical window of opportunity to slow or change its trajectory, especially given its growing prevalence in young adults.
items.curatedReason: 早期有症状髋关节骨关节炎（OA）的识别和干预非常重要，因为这是治疗可能改变疾病进展轨迹的“机会之窗”。你作为 PT 需要提高对该疾病早期阶段的识别能力，并了解其潜在的治疗益处，以优化患者转归。
items.titleZh: 早期有症状髋关节骨关节炎：一个机会之窗。
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述强调了识别和治疗早期有症状髋关节骨关节炎（OA）的重要性，认为这是一个减缓或改变其病程轨迹的关键机会之窗，尤其考虑到该病在年轻人中的患病率不断上升。
items.curatedReasonEn: Identifying and intervening in early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA) is crucial, as it represents a "window of opportunity" where treatment can potentially alter disease trajectory. As a PT, you need to enhance your ability to recognize this early stage and understand the potential treatment benefits to optimize patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一篇述评，不提供新的研究数据或系统性证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective article, not providing new research data or systematic evidence.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model achieved 70.9% completion rates—exceeding national benchmarks (43%)—and 96% of completers achieved Minimal Clinically Important Differences in outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 远程物理治疗在骨科康复中展现了超越传统模式的潜力，特别是其在依从性和功能改善方面的优势。这项研究强调了远程 PT 模型的可行性与高效性，为你将虚拟护理整合到日常实践中提供了强有力的数据支持。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科远程物理治疗模型：患者依从性、临床结局与满意度的回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，一种先进的骨科远程物理治疗模型达到了 70.9% 的治疗完成率，超过全国基准（43%），且 96% 的完成者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual physical therapy shows potential to surpass traditional models in orthopedic rehabilitation, particularly in adherence and functional improvement. This study highlights the feasibility and efficiency of virtual PT models, providing strong data to support integrating virtual care into your daily practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且缺乏对照组，无法排除混杂因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study lacks a control group, making it unable to rule out confounding factors influencing the results.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found that preoperative physiotherapy did not significantly improve patient-reported outcomes or pain at two months and one year after primary total knee arthroplasty, compared to no preoperative physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了重要的临床见解：术前物理治疗未能显著改善初次全膝关节置换术后一年的患者报告结局和疼痛。在考虑常规推荐术前 PT 时，请审慎评估其额外价值，并更多关注术后康复方案的优化。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 名患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的 1,688 名患者队列研究发现，术前物理治疗并未显著改善初次全膝关节置换术后两个月和一年时的患者报告结局或疼痛，与未接受术前物理治疗的患者相比。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study offers critical clinical insight: preoperative physical therapy did not significantly improve patient-reported outcomes or pain one year after primary total knee arthroplasty. When considering routine recommendations for preoperative PT, carefully evaluate its added value and focus more on optimizing postoperative rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性队列研究，尽管进行了多变量调整，仍无法完全排除未测量的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study; despite multivariate adjustments, unmeasured confounding factors cannot be completely ruled out.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that therapeutic massage, alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy, effectively improved pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life in individuals with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome in the short term.
items.curatedReason: 针对肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩无论是单独使用还是结合传统物理治疗，在短期内都显示出对疼痛和功能障碍的改善。这提示你，治疗性按摩可以是肌筋膜疼痛综合征管理中有效的辅助手段，但仍需更长期随访数据支持其持续疗效。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合传统物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，治疗性按摩无论是单独使用还是结合传统物理治疗，在短期内均有效改善了慢性斜方肌上部肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的疼痛、压痛阈值、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: For myofascial pain syndrome, therapeutic massage, whether alone or combined with conventional physical therapy, showed short-term improvements in pain and functional disability. This suggests that therapeutic massage can be an effective adjunct in managing myofascial pain syndrome, but long-term follow-up data is still needed to support its sustained efficacy.
items.limitation: 研究仅关注短期效应，无法评估长期疗效；样本量相对较小（60 名参与者）。
items.limitationEn: The study focused only on short-term effects, making it unable to assess long-term efficacy; the sample size was relatively small (60 participants).

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study among 20 Australian physiotherapists found that the WalkBack program for low back pain prevention is acceptable but requires training, flexibility, and system-level enablers to optimize implementation in routine practice.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 项目为预防性腰痛干预提供了一个可行的框架，但其在临床实践中的采纳需要更多系统层面的支持和灵活性。你可以思考如何将类似的预防项目整合到日常工作中，并向上级提出所需的支持，以更好地服务有复发风险的患者。
items.titleZh: WalkBack（步行与教育）项目预防腰痛对物理治疗师来说是可接受的，但其优化实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 名澳大利亚物理治疗师的定性研究发现，WalkBack 腰痛预防项目虽然可接受，但其在常规实践中的优化实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack program offers a viable framework for preventive low back pain intervention, but its adoption in clinical practice requires more system-level support and flexibility. You can consider how to integrate similar preventive programs into your daily work and advocate for the necessary support from management to better serve patients at risk of recurrence.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，其结果不能代表所有物理治疗师的观点，也无法量化采纳障碍和促进因素。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study's findings do not represent all physiotherapists' views and cannot quantify barriers and facilitators to adoption.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (n=1350) in Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain found socio-cultural factors, such as education level and migration background, predicted pain intensity, disability, and quality of life outcomes at 3, 6, and 12 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了社会文化因素在非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量中的预测作用。它提醒你，在评估和治疗 NSMSP 患者时，不能只关注生物医学因素，还需要将患者的教育水平、移民背景等社会文化因素纳入考量，以提供更全面的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的社会文化预测因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 1350 名荷兰初级物理治疗机构非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素（如教育水平和移民背景）可预测患者在 3、6 和 12 个月时的疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals the predictive role of socio-cultural factors in pain intensity, disability, and quality of life for patients with non-specific musculoskeletal pain. It reminds you that when assessing and treating NSMSP patients, you should not only focus on biomedical factors but also consider socio-cultural factors such as education level and migration background, to provide a more comprehensive rehabilitation plan.
items.limitation: 研究基于荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者，结果的外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was based on patients receiving primary care physiotherapy in the Netherlands, which may limit the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: A study found that individuals after ACL reconstruction exhibited lower triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls, with no significant bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌肌电活动可能降低。这提示你在 ACLR 术后康复中，应特别关注腓肠肌的神经肌肉控制训练，因为它可能在 ACL 损伤和再损伤的风险因素中被低估。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，前交叉韧带重建术后个体在单腿跳跃任务中，腓肠肌的肌电活动低于健康对照组，且 ACLR 组内部未观察到显著的双侧差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients after ACL reconstruction may exhibit reduced triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks. This suggests that in ACLR rehabilitation, you should pay particular attention to neuromuscular control training for the triceps surae, as it might be an underestimated factor in ACL injury and re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，且为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size and a cross-sectional design, preventing the establishment of causality.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT (n=24 male athletes) found eight weeks of visual perturbation training improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors in male athletes after ACL reconstruction, suggesting benefits for restoring subtle neuromuscular deficits.
items.curatedReason: 针对 ACLR 术后重返运动的男性运动员，为期八周的视觉扰动训练能有效改善其非预期性切入动作的下肢生物力学并减少错误。这表明在 ACL 康复中，除了传统的肌肉强化和本体感觉训练，你还应考虑加入认知负荷下的动态任务，以更好地模拟运动实况，降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 八周视觉扰动训练对前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员非预期性切入下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（24 名男性运动员）发现，为期八周的视觉扰动训练改善了前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员非预期性切入时的下肢生物力学并减少了错误，提示其对恢复细微神经肌肉缺陷有益。
items.curatedReasonEn: For male athletes returning to sport after ACLR, eight weeks of visual perturbation training effectively improves lower-limb biomechanics and reduces errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers. This suggests that in ACL rehabilitation, beyond traditional muscle strengthening and proprioceptive training, you should consider incorporating dynamic tasks under cognitive load to better simulate real-sport conditions and reduce re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于男性运动员，结果对外推到女性或其他人群时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to male athletes, so caution is needed when generalizing the results to females or other populations.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 ACL-injured patients found that mindset, effort, and support were foundational to their decision to return to sport, highlighting motivation, treatment/recovery, and medical clearance/readiness as key determinants.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决策受心态、努力和支持这三个核心因素影响。这意味着你在帮助患者做重返运动决策时，不仅要评估其生理恢复情况，更要深入了解他们的心理准备、投入程度以及来自医疗团队和环境的支持，提供更个性化的指导。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力与支持——前交叉韧带损伤患者重返运动决策的基础。NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 112 名 ACL 损伤患者的定性分析发现，心态、努力和支持是他们重返运动决策的基础，其中动机、治疗与康复、医学许可与准备是关键决定因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACL injury patients' return-to-sport decisions are influenced by three core factors: mindset, effort, and support. This means that when helping patients make return-to-sport decisions, you should not only assess their physiological recovery but also delve into their psychological readiness, commitment, and the support from their medical team and environment, providing more personalized guidance.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，数据来自患者的自由文本回答，可能存在主观性和信息不完整性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative analysis relies on patients' free-text responses, which may introduce subjectivity and incomplete information.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
